source_text: Document the adhesive choice, age and expiration date, substrate preparation, and the equivalency of the bonded joint in the SES F.5.5.3 The SES will reduce any referenced or tested adhesive values by $50 \%$ ## F.5.6 Roll Hoops F.5.6.1 The Chassis must include both a Main Hoop and a Front Hoop. F.5.6.2
requirement_text_pred: Document the adhesive choice, age and expiration date, substrate preparation, and the equivalency of the bonded joint in the SES F.5.5.3

prediction.object: the adhesive choice, age and expiration date, substrate preparation, and the equivalency of the bonded joint in the SES F.5.5.3

notes: We did not consider this requirement as a decomposition error because it seems more like an imperative requirement: the subject is implicit in the text, but the prescription is clear and has a condition and an object.
